chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-8092 of 2018 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of Misc. No.354352018 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 03.09.2021 Mr. M. Ali Lakhani, advocate for the Petitioner. Syed Hassan Abidi, advocate for KMC. Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, Addl. A.G. ------ Counsel for the petitioners under instructions of his client does not press this petition as their grievance stated to have been redressed. Instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE SM
